name: Orange and Peanut Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice sweet potatoes crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices.
2. Place the sliced sweet potatoes in a 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle lightly with salt.
4. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of orange juice.
5. Cook on high power for 6 to 8 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender. Let stand, covered.
6. For the sauce: In a 2-cup measure, stir together 1/2 cup of orange juice, cornstarch, and finely shredded orange peel.
7. Stir in honey (or maple syrup).
8. Cook uncovered on high power for 1 to 2 minutes, or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
9. Stir the sauce and potato slices together.
10. Sprinkle with roasted, unsalted peanuts.
NOTE: True maple syrup is the best if you have it.
